description: Pre-defined dimensions for the sales data model initialization

dimensions.description: Full name of the customer organization
dimensions.notes: Primary customer identifier for grouping and filtering sales data

dimensions.description: Business segment classification: Enterprise, Corporate, or Small Business
dimensions.notes: Useful for segment-level analysis and targeted reporting

dimensions.description: Geographic region: North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, or Latin America
dimensions.notes: Key dimension for geographic performance analysis

dimensions.description: Top-level product category: Electronics, Furniture, or Office Supplies
dimensions.notes: High-level product grouping for strategic analysis
Quarterly performance tracking using the quarter_year UDF

usage_notes.loading: These dimensions can be loaded into the system using the create_dimension Tauri command
usage_notes.combining: Dimensions can be combined with metrics to create flexible reports and visualizations
usage_notes.relationships: The system automatically resolves JOIN paths between dimension tables and fact tables
usage_notes.hierarchies: Natural hierarchies exist: Region > City, Category > Sub-Category, Year > Quarter > Month
